changes: The level cap for blue mage has been increased to 80.
New blue magic spells have been added.
Ice Spikes: Veil of the Whorl and Schiltron cannot be applied simultaneously.
Veil of the Whorl: Ice Spikes and Schiltron cannot be applied simultaneously.
Aetheric Mimicry: Aetheric Mimicry: Healer now increases the potency of all healing effects.
Help text for blue magic spells will now indicate with which other blue magic spells they share a recast timer.

new_content.name: Mount Rokkon
new_content.description: A variant dungeon where players explore winding paths to uncover the history of the mountain; difficulty scales according to party size.

new_content.name: Another Mount Rokkon
new_content.description: A criterion dungeon for a party of four players with item level and role requirements.

new_content.name: Another Mount Rokkon (Savage)
new_content.description: A savage criterion dungeon for a pre-formed party of four, featuring strict resurrection and reset rules.

new_content.name: Manderville Weapons
new_content.description: Continuation of the Manderville weapon enhancement series.

new_content.name: Splendorous Tools
new_content.description: Enhancement series for Disciples of the Hand and Land tools.

new_content.name: Blue Mage Job Quests
new_content.description: New job quests to accommodate the level cap increase to 80.

new_content.name: Blue Mage
new_content.description: Level cap increased to 80; new spells, stages in the Masked Carnivale, and log entries added.

new_content.name: V&C Dungeon Finder
new_content.description: System used to register for Variant and Criterion dungeons.

new_content.name: New Game+
new_content.description: New chapters added to the New Game+ system.

housing.name: Komainu Statue
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: Ward off malevolent spirits with this dignified statue.

housing.name: Stone Toro Lantern
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: A moss-covered stone lantern constructed in the Far Eastern style. Its base is attached to a thick stone slab for support.

housing.name: Planted Toro Lantern
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: A moss-covered stone lantern constructed in the Far Eastern style and driven directly into the earth, the better to blend in with natural surrounds.

housing.name: Smashed Flower Pot
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: Let the resilience of the flowers which persevere in the soil of this damaged pot serve as a reminder that hope springs eternal.

housing.name: Ornate Fountain
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing: Decorated with delicate designs and crystal panels, this water feature gushes elegance.

housing.name: Far Eastern Indoor Bamboo Fountain
housing.description: Furnishing: A masterfully crafted indoor fountain wrought from bamboo and stone.

housing.name: Seiryu Sculpture
housing.description: Furnishing: An imposing rendition of the serpentine auspice Seiryu. Place eastward for best results.

housing.name: Suzaku Sculpture
housing.description: Furnishing: An imposing rendition of the fiery auspice Suzaku. Place southward for best results.

housing.name: Oyoroi Display
housing.description: Tabletop: A set of Far Eastern armor arranged to resemble a stern─yet comfortably seated─warrior.

housing.name: Far Eastern Brazier
housing.description: Tabletop: The dancing flames atop this Far Eastern-styled brazier warm the heart and soul.

housing.name: Cactuar Colony Planter
housing.description: Tabletop: A large pot containing an assortment of cacti fashioned to resemble a colony of cactuars. Their empty gaze is somehow unsettling.

housing.name: Assorted Cookies
housing.description: Tabletop: A delectable assemblage of cookies catering to various tastes. Sure to satisfy any and every sweet tooth.

housing.name: Imitation Vault
housing.description: Wall-mounted: For those with more money than sense, yet less money than requires an actual vault.

glamour.name: Phantasmal Attire Coffer (IL 530)
